findings.description: The knowledge file appends a file path annotation `（ファイルパス: \`assets/configuration-configuration/デフォルト設定一覧.xlsx\`）` that has no basis in the source file. The source only provides the RST download directive `:download:\`デフォルト設定一覧.xlsx <デフォルト設定一覧.xlsx>\`` with no mention of an `assets/` directory path.
findings.source_evidence: :download:`デフォルト設定一覧.xlsx <デフォルト設定一覧.xlsx>`
